pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly copies the database to this path.
Confirmed via task description instructions and verifier.py scoring logic.
Confirmed via task description instructing the agent to digitize near Brasilia (lat -15.8, lon -47.9), which falls precisely within this geographic bounding box.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target GeoPackage path is '/sdcard/Android/data/ch.opengis.qfield/files/Imported Datasets/world_survey.gpkg'. The expected attributes (fire_name, severity, date_observed, area_status) precisely match the instructions and verifier logic. The target location bounding box lat [-30, 0] and lon [-60, -35] correctly envelops the requested digitization coordinates near Brasilia (-15.8, -47.9). The world_survey.gpkg dataset is an artificially constructed toy database (synthetic scenario).
